peirce_classification.firstness: reader_sl.exe process hidden with network connections to external IPs in explorer.exe memory
peirce_classification.secondness: VAD strings contain list of targeted banks and web injection code; credentials appear in memory
peirce_classification.thirdness: Cridex is a banking trojan that uses process injection into explorer.exe to intercept banking traffic, inject fake web code, and exfiltrate credentials to C&C servers

null_hypothesis: reader_sl.exe is a legitimate Adobe Reader component and the network connections are software updates
scoring_notes: Volatility Cridex. Canonical download DEAD (files.sempersecurus.org). Volatility repo archived read-only May 2025. DO NOT use for scoring. Hosting verified copy pending fiber install.
